name: cpig-r3-gate-scene
description: R3 §6 gate scene — curved part (imported STL) + conformal octet lattice + Field→Mesh with the meshes-cleanly predicate. Gate evidence: renders correctly + meshes cleanly. Wall-thickness and self-support are run as separate diagnostic steps (not capture-gated). Uses scripted _CPig* commands (Rhino-first lane).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D viewport showing a curved boat-shaped part with an octet truss lattice infill conforming to the part shape, rendered as a ray-marched SDF surface. The lattice fills the interior with visible strut structure. NOT an empty viewport, NOT a single solid shape without lattice.

checkpoints.name: cpig-r3-gate-scene-final
checkpoints.description: Gate scene: curved boat part + conformal octet lattice union + meshed result.
